speaker: speaker1
text: Man , I'm hungry . Do you know a good place to have lunch ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I know a great place . What types of food do you like ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Mexican , Japanese or Chinese would be great .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , I know a place where you might like to eat .

speaker: speaker2
text: It's down a block on the right ; can I show you the way ?

speaker: speaker2
text: This will work out well . I'm getting hungry just thinking about it .
